quote: The Laksa Johor here is the real deal. Pekat broth, proper spaghetti, and the sambal belacan hits just right. Finally found a place in KL that does it like home.
name: Ahmad K.

quote: Been coming here since 2015. The Lontong Darat with kuah kacang reminds me of my grandmother's cooking. Family-run, honest food, generous portions.
name: Nurul I.

quote: Took my parents here and they loved it. Nasi Ambeng was huge and every component tasted fresh. The iced coffee is proper old-school Johor style too.
name: Hafiz R.
